audit_result.proof_trace: BlobsByRange protocol remains in supported_protocols list forever (conditional only on Deneb fork existence, not epoch). No code rejects requests after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. Handler only validates availability boundary for pruning, not deprecation.
audit_result.attack_scenario: After FULU activation + MIN_EPOCHS, attacker sends BlobsByRange requests to force nodes to serve deprecated blob data instead of data columns, bypassing PeerDAS migration and enabling resource exhaustion via dual serving obligations.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-028.text: blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS.
